textByHashes.8a6896c3bfd3231059073b953b5d0b24c42085ae: Oh hello . I'm Aeryka. Aery for short.
textByHashes.52c2544e08d8dcb3680f4434a15035ae16137614: That's right. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.8e9683c513855e2366d95bd1066b05d190f432c6: Crop circle? Oh, you mean the Puromantic portal?
textByHashes.65654b5e9b8fce08dabeaac6146fac08a71ebb76: The Puromantic portal. At least that's what we call them. It's the way the implings travel from Puro-Puro to other planes.
textByHashes.8534552e84b8c3f237e60dc3a152b290e286dac8: The impling home. We call it Puro-Puro. The implings just call it home, I think.
textByHashes.e31f282fe2545dbb34ee9f6cef0ef855f84b5d01: It's still here. The crop circle is still here.
textByHashes.2f146c4bc87c96d4db44e9febdf86cc59eb8b49b: Not really. Though I have noticed quite a lot of you humans travelling through the portal recently. I suppose you must like wheat.
textByHashes.fd42d1c063ac5e31de6c754778e6ea12a2a01f28: Oh, I did notice a very serious-looking gnome go into the portal. Maybe he knows what's going on.
textByHashes.1b6ff26a18e161132efe96eadc6198c1b4c31385: Errm, Egg-nog, or something like that.
textByHashes.7875ad8d5095b0d16dad6249e1cc8622ef491494: Well, no-one knows for sure. The mischievous little creatures are probably related to imps. And they fly as well.
textByHashes.78134759d6b240af2d16c7054b620d178bca2b47: Also, like imps, they love collecting things. I'm not sure why, though. They also seem to like being chased.
textByHashes.50e7783d3c7597c5d45823cae38154a99811bd53: Catch them, I suppose. I don't know really. Why would you want to?
textByHashes.fa59b60a76622834804070d81cc8631295e49a55: Sounds a bit cruel to me, but I suppose that's possible.
textByHashes.be2a2995ac3baf133ff13553e6f8b67fcc8ca668: Really? You humans like that stuff a lot, don't you? I don't like really old stuff myself.
textByHashes.0e3de2cad28a3f84e2c79b0680ece26d55f0b556: Yes, dragon stuff feels really old.
textByHashes.db804cdca72fb10be214185386c70d957c1e58aa: From its magical aura, obviously. Oh, I forget you humans can't feel auras.
textByHashes.734d1bbbe65d9b544962c85de3b7d6680da42d66: Not really. Time doesn't really mean a lot round here. Hundreds, maybe thousands of your human lifespans, I suppose. Anyway, it would have to be old since it all comes from the Necrosyrtes.
textByHashes.c614983163d19d80d0822ca6a3a3a3915f54b339: Old and powerful creatures. I don't think there have been any around here for aeons. I haven't seen one. I don't think they are very nice. Not like me. Anyway, this is all ancient history. Boooring!
textByHashes.5762b0040bfce84708be5b683f4cd53a0912115f: Oh, I did have loads, but I threw it away.
textByHashes.ccf967a6cbf1a44b4ab230f741514dcf62f0288e: No, sorry, I can't help you there. You'll have to look for it yourself. Although, maybe if you find Necrosyrtes then they'll give you some. I heard they give dragon stuff away to people they like. Not fairies. We're too
